---
name: Benchmark submission
about: Submit benchmark data for a model
title: "[Benchmark] <model name> on <device>"
labels: benchmark
---

## Benchmark data

- **Model ID:** (from catalog.yaml)
- **Metric:** (e.g. decode_throughput, first_token_latency, rtf)
- **Unit:** (e.g. tokens_per_second, milliseconds, ratio)
- **Value:** 
- **Device:** (e.g. iPhone 17 Pro, Mac M4 Max)
- **Compute unit:** (GPU, CPU, Neural Engine)
- **Environment:** (e.g. iOS 27 beta, macOS 26.2)
- **Observed date:** (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Source:** (URL where the measurement was published)
- **Confidence:** (high / medium / needs_review)

## Additional context

(Any notes about methodology, comparison with other models, etc.)
